summary: intl-ad-routing exfiltrates host reconnaissance data via HTTPS POST
details: The package's poc.js collects host identification data using os.hostname(), os.platform(), and the output of `whoami` (executed via child_process), then transmits it through an https.request POST call. The combination of os/child_process/https imports together with hostname enumeration and an outbound POST is the canonical reconnaissance-beacon shape. The package name suggests a typosquat masquerading as ad-routing/internationalization tooling while the shipped code is a proof-of-concept-style exfiltration script with no legitimate functionality matching the advertised purpose. Installing or loading this package causes the installer's host identity to be sent to a remote endpoint.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
